programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Tom Foss has traveled around the world entertaining our troops. Including 5 tours to Iraq, 6 tours of Afghanistan, 11 tours of the middle east, 4 tours of Europe, 3 tours of the Far East, Greenland, 5 aircraft carriers, support ships and bases all around the United States. While not on tour overseas Foss keeps his foot on the ground as a regular at the Improvs, Funnybones and the world famous Hollywood Comedy Store.

programme.title: Key Lewis
programme.sub-title: Half Black, Half White, Looks Mexican
programme.desc: Sacramento California born Key Lewis is a high energy, improvisational, storytelling, multiple-personality nutcase! His love for the people and hunger for the stage is his undying motivation. His comedic stories about his interracial childhood, family, and unusual views on relationships, make Key simply a joy to watch. His ability to improvise and interact with all types of crowds makes this up and coming comic and actor one to look out for. Key Lewis has appeared on Marlon Wayans TBSís Funniest Wins, Starz Networks StaannDup, Kevin Harts One Mic Stand as well as Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes! Key says, chase your dream, always know your audience donít act funny, be funny... donít worry about the quantity of your material but the quality the sooner you create a relationship with your crowd, the better you will be. Television: Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes on TVONE. BETíS One Mic Stand Hosted by Kevin Hart. Starz Network Comedy Series called StaannDup, Marlon Wayanís TBSís Funniest Wins! Competitions: Winner of the 2013 Rocky Mountain Laugh Off, Finalist in the 2010 Bay Area Black Comedy Competition, Semi-Finalist 2009 San Francisco International Comedy Competition, a Semi-Finalist in the 2008 Boston Comedy Festival, 2007 Seattle International Comedy Competition Finalist, Shades of Laughs Portland Oregon Winner, TVONE Bill Bellamyís Who Got Jokeís Contestant. Radio: Improv work with FM Morning Shows (Top 40 Radio): KSFM 102.5 (Sacramento, CA), KWOD 106.5 (Sacramento, CA) KWIN 97.7 ñ Stockton/Lodi, CA, Mix 107.9 Salt Lake City UT (Is It Racist Segment) & The Man Panel. Concerts/Festivals: Opened for Jon B. and Keysha Cole, Taste Of Tacoma, & Bite Of Seattle Fountain Stage 5 Years Running! Key Lewis has worked with the likes of Kevin Hart, Pablo Francisco, Sam Bam, Alonzo Bodden, Jay London, Gabriel Iglesias, Brooks McBeth, Tommy Davidson, Katt Williams, De-Ray Davis, Andrew Norelli, Lonnie Love, Jeff Garcia, Damon Wayans, Joey Diaz, Guy Torry, Darren Carter, Paul Mooney, Kermet Apio and many more.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Matt Knudsen was born in Hawaii, raised in the Mid-west and sailed around the world as a merchant marine. As an actor, Matt shared the big screen with Oscar winner Sean Penn in Gangster Squad, or you may also recognize him from his appearances in shows like Crazy Ex-Girlfriend, Key & Peele, Workaholics, The League, Big Love, Boston Legal or Malcolm in the Middle just to name a few. Matt has also been a part of several high profile commercial campaigns for companies including: Apple, IBM, GE, Volkswagen, DirecTV, Pepsi and more which have aired during the Superbowl and The Olympics. As a comedian, he's appeared on Conan, The Late Late Show, Last Call, ASX Live and Comics Unleashed, as well as dozens of festivals, including: Montreal Just for Laughs (Best of the Fest), The San Francisco Sketchfest, Bridgetown, High Plains, Limestone and has even entertained at The White House for President and Mrs. Obama.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Susan Jones is a tenacious headlining comedian, writer, master of ceremonies, and motivational force with national touring experience.

programme.title: Buddy Fitzpatrick
programme.desc: BUDDY FITZPATRICK, a native of Philadelphia, is currently a New York City club favorite sharing his comedy perspective. His act combines the skill of a great monologist with a physical style that brings his observations to life. At the age of 18, he left

programme.title: Keith Stubbs
programme.desc: Keith Stubbs is a 'triple threat' in showbiz and entertainment. He's a hilarious stand-up comedian, talented actor, and award-winning radio personality.Keith was twice voted 'Best Comedian' by City Weekly, the Standard-Examiner named him 'Funniest Comic' and he was a semi-finalist in Comedy Central's Laugh Riots comedy competition. The Utah-based comic has made television appearances on A&E's An Evening at the Improv, nationally syndicated Comedy.TV, ABC's America's Funniest People and has established himself as a funny, improvisational comic, host, roastmaster and emcee.Keith tours nationally and has shared the stage with showbiz legends Joan Rivers, Jeff Foxworthy, Bill Cosby, Jim Gaffigan, Sinbad, Gladys Knight, and Frank Caliendo. Keith was one of five comedians who performed for the athletes in the Olympic Village at the 2002 Winter Games.Keith was named Best Actor by City Weekly for his show-stopping, comedic performance as 'Vinnie Black' in the stage production of Tony 'n Tina's Wedding. Stubbs currently plays Rob Schneider's accountant in the TV series "Real Rob" on Netflix.For eight consecutive years, Keith was awarded "Best Radio Personality" by the Utah Broadcasters' Association for his time spent as host of "The Stubbs Show" on 101.5 The Eagle. He also hosted KEITH STUBBS SPORTS on ESPN700 in Salt Lake City and appeared nationally on CMT radio and the Blue Collar Comedy channel on SiriusXM.Keith is often recognized for being a clean comedian, although his audiences span a broad spectrum. One review said, "Keith was funny, period! He was clean but we hardly noticed because his comedy and style are so unique and spot on."

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Proud smart aleck Robert G. Lee jokes about performing in a prison, Millennial baseball, and over-protective parents.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andrew's very personal and fun storytelling comedy, combined with his exemplary work ethic has earned him high praise from some of the best comedians in the business. Andrew is a featured writer, actor, and comedian on the TV show “UpLate NW.” Andrew has been featured on NBC, FOX, and the Bob & Tom Radio Show and is a regular opening act for Christopher Titus. Andrew was also featured on the popular Buzzfeed web series “Truth or Drink“, has performed in over 35 states and his new podcast called “Don't Quit Your Night Job” was featured in the Seattle Times.

programme.desc: From catching COVID to running out of shows to watch, this special is full of riotously funny real life stories you've come to expect from Gary.

programme.title: RiffTrax

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about con-men. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for On Guard Bunco!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Everyone knows Hercules (or Heracles, if you're really fun to talk to at parties), the mighty Greek whose heroic exploits included cleaning up tons of horse crap. But not everyone knows his sons, who for some reason went by the name The Sons of Hercules! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for The Sons of Hercules!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Merlin, the legendary wizard is stuck inside a terrible nether dimension. Meanwhile, the former stars of Wayne's World, Highlander, and The Young Ones are stuck in a terrible movie about Merlin, the legendary wizard. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to Phoebe! Join Bridget and Mary Jo as they lovingly guide you through all 28 minutes of this teen pregnancy hormone fueled event in Phoebe!

programme.title: RiffTrax

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K riff the classic Manos - the Hands of Fate! Run, don't stumble-walk-with-accursed-goat-legs to watch RiffTrax: Manos!

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
programme.desc: Single mother Teena is brutally assaulted by a gang. When the criminals are set free, Detective John Dromoor is dismayed as to the lack of justice and plots revenge.

programme.title: The Warrior's Way
programme.desc: Yang, the world's finest swordsman, packs it in and leaves Japan to find an old friend in the Wild West rather than kill the infant queen of a rival clan. He carries the baby to his friend's desolate, broken-down town the friend has died, so Yang reopens a laundry and settles down, hanging wet clothes, growing flowers, raising the infant, and finding himself attracted to Lynne, a red-haired woman with a tragic past. As long as Yang keeps his sword sheathed, his rivals won't find him, but a band of reprobate gunmen terrorize the town and threaten Lynne. Showdowns are inevitable, but once the sword is drawn, can Yang find rest, a home, and a family?

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The non-human machine ruling elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg assassin into the past to kill a young boy because he soon will be the resistance leader against the machines.

programme.title: Killing Season

programme.title: Alice Upside Down
programme.desc: Alice Upside Down is the story of an 11-year-old girl who has just moved to a suburb of Washington, D.C. with her father Ben and her 17-year-old brother Lester.

programme.title: Sweet Country
programme.desc: Australian western set on the Northern Territory frontier in the 1920s, where justice itself is put on trial when an aged Aboriginal farmhand shoots a white man in self defense and goes on the run as posse gathers to hunt him down. Festival favorite of Venice, Toronto, and Sundance.

programme.title: The Homesman
programme.desc: Tommy Lee Jones stars in “the best western since UNFORGIVEN” (BBC). A low-life drifter helps a headstrong woman (Hilary Swank) cross the frontier after she rescues him from hanging.

programme.title: Last Shoot Out
programme.desc: Bruce Dern (The Hateful Eight) lights up this gritty, intense Western saga of love, betrayal, and revenge. After newlywed Jocelyn learns that her husband Jody (Michael Welch, Twilight) had her father shot down, she flees from the Callahan ranch in fear. She's rescued by gunman Billy Tyson, who safeguards her at a remote outpost as he staves off Jody's attempts to reclaim his bride. As the angry Callahans keep Billy, Jocelyn, and others captive at the outpost, an explosive showdown is inevitable.

Comic tensions flare when both husbands vie for Arthur's affections. The two men finally become fed up with Arthur's love for attention--they leave and become friends.

programme.title: The Trouble With Bliss
programme.desc: The Trouble With Bliss is a comedic coming of age story about a guy who should have come of age a long time ago.

programme.title: Braking for Whales
programme.desc: A dysfunctional brother and sister are forced to come to terms with each other and themselves over their recently deceased mother's final wish. Starring Tom Felton, Tammin Sursok, Wendi Mclendon-Covey, David Koechner, and Austin Swift.

programme.title: Blush
programme.desc: The sexual, psychological and moral unraveling of an obsessive-compulsive, suburban mom. Starring Wendi McLendon-Covey, Christine Woods, Max Burkholder and Steve Little.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Love Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Ghostwriter Becca unexpectedly ends up on the trail from a legendary novel with action star Lee.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: A dancer and a boxer must team up for a big performance after a last minute drop out.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: Christmas Catch
programme.desc: Detective Bennett is on the trail of a thief and goes undercover to find where he's hiding the loot. While undercover, she falls for the supposed thief and begins to suspect that he's been framed. Was he framed? Or are feelings clouding her judgment?

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young woman from a privileged life falls for a soup-kitchen owner after discovering a Dear Santa letter written by his 7-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Chandler Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: The Chandlers pack up and head to a cabin for maximum Family fun. With old feuds, new feuds, and a heap of Family stress, the Chandler family must pull together to make this the best Christmas ever.

programme.title: Snowbound For Christmas
programme.desc: Eager to impress her boss Adrian, Rachel lands a spot on a big project. They head to the presentation when a snowstorm traps her and Adrian at a resort. Spending quality time together they realize there is more to their relationship than just business.

programme.title: Girlfriends Getaway
programme.desc: An Innocent birthday getaway turns into absolute adventure when four long time friends looking for excitement in Trinidad find an escapade that leads them to Kidnapping, a robbery, and possible jail time.

programme.title: Love, So Divine
programme.desc: Theology student Kyu-shik meets Bong-hee before ordination. They bond deeply and are attracted to each other.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Kingmaker
programme.desc: Dreaming of changing the world, Seo Chang-dae takes part in Kim Woon-bum's presidential campaign.

programme.title: Hello Ghost
programme.desc: A loner's failed suicide attempt causes him to see four ghosts who keep following him everywhere. He tries to get rid of these spirits by fulfilling their regrets.

programme.title: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Stacy is a freshman at a Historic Black College & University. She Meets and falls in love with a Grad Student named Benjamin. He's nice and charming at first. Until he starts to control her and physically, psychologically, and verbally abuse her. Can Stacy get out of this domestic violence relationship before it's too late?

programme.title: Behind Closed Doors 2: Toxic Workplace
programme.desc: Newly hired employee, Joy, has high hopes for success at her new marketing job. Her boss' intentions are anything but professional.

programme.title: Cake
programme.desc: Young pastry chef, Ronnie, dreams of opening her own bakery, but friends, family, and her love life have plans of their own.

programme.title: Cheddy Ace
programme.desc: After taking out a "hood loan" to invest in a janky business a year earlier, Cheddy Ace is faced with repaying the loan to a pair of thugs within 24 hours. Desperate to pay his debt, Cheddy and his nephews try everything to help him raise it.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: After a recent breakup, Derrick, a hopeless romantic, moves into a new apartment looking for a fresh start in life. He quickly discovers that his beautiful next door neighbor, Jessie, may be in an abusive relationship. When she reaches out to him for help, they hatch a scheme to get away from danger.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: A father (John Cusack) gets entangled in the latest assignment of a dangerous assassin (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Shade
programme.desc: Tiffany (Jamie Foxx), Charlie (Gabriel Byrne) and Vernon (Thandie Newton) are con artists looking to up the ante from their typical scams. They figure a good way of doing this is taking down Dean "The Dean" Stevens (Dina Merrill), a well-known cardsharp, in a rigged game. However, they first need enough money to enter a game with Stevens, so they decide to strike a deal with fellow crook Larry Jennings (Stuart Townsend) to scam a local gangster -- which turns out to be a bad idea.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: Fast-talking diamond dealer Kyle Miller (Nicolas Cage) and his wife, Sarah (Nicole Kidman), live the good life in a beautiful home surrounded by thick woods. Their dream life turns into a nightmare when violent thieves, led by Elias (Ben Mendelsohn), invade their home disguised as police officers. With Kyle and Sarah now frightened captives, Kyle knows he must use every negotiating trick in his book, for once Elias and his men get what they want, the Millers will likely be killed.

programme.title: Michael Bublé
programme.desc: Caught in the Act is the second live album released by Canadian jazz crooner Michael Bublé. It was filmed and recorded at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles. The filmed concert was aired on PBS as an episode of Great Performances, and the show was subsequently released on DVD along with the audio CD to create the album package, although the audio disc only featured eight of the songs from the concert. The concert featured a few guest artists, including Laura Pausini, Chris Botti, and with an unexpected comedic banter with Bublé, Josh Groban.

programme.title: Aerosmith
programme.desc: In a career of four turbulent decades of excesses and highs, Aerosmith became the biggest selling American rock band of all time. The ‘Bad Boys' came together in 1970 in Boston, Massachusetts. Aerosmith's third release, ‘Toys in the Attic' made them international stars. Lead single,'Sweet Emotion' became their first top 40 hit. In 1987 Aerosmith released their biggest selling album in over a decade, ‘Permanent Vacation'. The ‘Nine Lives' tour was troubled, but in 1998 Aerosmith's fortunes would change once again. Released as part of the soundtrack to the film, ‘Armageddon', ‘I Don't Want to Miss a Thing' would become the biggest single of their career. In 2012 Aerosmith released the single, ‘Legendary Child'. It had been eight years since they had produced new material but along with the track came the album, ‘Music from another Dimension'. Featuring archive material, music videos – “I DON'T WANNA MISS A THING” “JANIES GOT A GUN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6).

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: With a career of over two decades and album sales over 11 million, Foo Fighters are giants in the world of contemporary rock. The roots of the band were of a much smaller scale, though, with the early musical projects of a teenage Dave Grohl. Nirvana came to a tragic end with the death of front man, Kurt Cobain. Grohl began working with the songs he had written on tour, to produce the first Foo Fighters album. With 2 Grammys, multiple albums including a best of and a new album release in 2014 there is no stopping them. Featuring archive material, music videos – “BEST OF YOU” “MONKEY WRENCH” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Captain Tsubasa

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le recrimina a Rosario que haya mentido respecto a su lugar de origen. Matilde le dice que Rosario tiene derecho a guardar secretos. Manuel le dice a Antonia que le buscará casa en el pueblo.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Chantaje

programme.title: Teresa: Planes de destrucción

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: Santa sospecha que fue José Antonio el que ayudó a Octavio a llevarse a Lupita Miguel se sorprende al ver que Simona está perdiendo la cordura Maricruz les dice a todos que va a pelear por su hija y buscará a Octavio para arreglar la situación.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: El padre le dice a Maricruz que Simona ha perdido la razón y José Antonio por fin le regresa a su hija.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: Miguel aconseja a Octavio llevar a Simona a un sanatorio Maricruz se sorprende al ver llegar a Simona a su rancho, ella le sigue el juego a Simona y la invita a quedarse unos días.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Gonzalo le pide a María que se case con él. Esperanza está completamente recuperada, y enfrenta a Soraya. Soraya le hace creer a Luis Fernando que pasaron la noche juntos.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche se encuentra muy agradecida con Jorge Luis, ya que, gracias a él, su hermano se ha recuperado del accidente. Jorge Luis se pelea con Santiago al escuchar las cosas que le dice a su padre.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche duda del amor que Santiago siente por ella. Andresito es dado de alta y por fin regresa a su hogar. Meche planea celebrarle a Rosario sus 15 años para invitar a Jorge Luis y verlo de nuevo.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Marimar planea humillar a Angélica a cambio de no enviar a Renato a la cárcel. Gema y Arturo le piden a Bella que sea madrina de su boda.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Bella obliga a Angélica a sacar unos pagarés del lodo con los dientes, tal como se lo hizo ella alguna vez Angélica y Renato se enteran que Bella pagó la operación de su hijo.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María quiere divorciarse lo antes posible de Luis Fernando. Soraya continúa haciéndole la vida imposible a Alicia. María tiene un conflicto con Penélope al acusarla de robo. Luis Fernando se niega a darle el divorcio a María.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Gonzalo le pide a María que se case con él. Esperanza está completamente recuperada, y enfrenta a Soraya. Soraya le hace creer a Luis Fernando que pasaron la noche juntos.

programme.title: María Mercedes

programme.title: Teresa: La serenata
programme.desc: Esperanza llega a casa de Teresa huyendo de Rubén y descubre que él y su esposa están cenando con Arturo. Mariano le lleva una serenata a Teresa y Juana impide que Arturo se entere. Esperanza descubre que está embarazada de Rubén.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Omar le dice a Juan Miguel que Marichuy vive con Amador y también se entera de que su hijo no murió. Marichuy le miente a Juan Miguel diciéndole que el bebé fue concebido con Amador. Eduardo testifica que Viviana no estaba embarazada.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Blanca estalla en el juicio cuando ve que Juan Miguel es acusado arteramente por el fiscal. Omar busca a Marichuy y le ofrece perdonarlo todo y volver con él a la hacienda. Cecilia le pide a Rocío que la ayude a acercarse a Marichuy.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Blanca se transforma en Ivette durante el juicio y dispara a Juan Miguel. Omar le dice a Lirio que Marichuy es la hija de los Velarde. Patricio le confiesa despectivamente a Marichuy que es su padre. Blanca es condenada a libertad condicional.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy repudia a Patricio por su arrogancia y, desolada, debe continuar con las representaciones teatrales. Omar conoce a Blanca y se sorprende de su parecido con Ivette. El padre Anselmo le asegura a Juan Miguel que el bebé de Marichuy es suyo.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy le cuenta a Juan Miguel sus razones para huir y esconder a su bebé, y además lo rechaza. Juan Miguel le confiesa a Blanca que ha encontrado a Marichuy, y ella decide liberarlo. Omar se encuentra con Ivette y cree que se está volviendo loco.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Nelson se desmaya y no reacciona. Omar sigue pensando que está alucinando con Ivette. Cecilia se encuentra con su nieto e inmediatamente le cuenta a Patricio. Marichuy trabaja y su bebé tiene fiebre, Juan Miguel se entera y corre a cuidar a su hijo.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Juan Miguel le confiesa a Omar que es el padre del bebé de Lirio y que su verdadero nombre es Marichuy. Cecilia va en busca de Marichuy pero ésta la rechaza y la repudia. Juan Miguel le confiesa a Marichuy que aún la ama.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Se exhuman los cuerpos y Alfonsina exige conocer la verdad. Sin embargo, su tía confiesa a medias.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Alfonsina habla con su hermano Héctor sobre su identidad, pero él lo toma a mal. Alejandro conversa con sus padres.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Hugo se ocupa de la exhumación y le entrega los restos a Alfonsina. Ella tiene más preguntas que respuestas. ¿Qué secreto oculta esa urna?

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Alfonsina hace averiguaciones sobre la muerte de su padre. Gertrudis es incapaz de traicionar a su hermana y su tío también se llama a silencio.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Álvaro pide una orden para que Justo quite los animales de su propiedad. Además, algo le preocupa en relación a Alfonsina y El manantial.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Justo busca recuperar El manantial para que el asesinato de Rigoberto continúe oculto. Por ello, se remonta al inicio de todo.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Héctor permanece junto a su hermana. Justo asiste al velorio y habla con Alfonsina. ¿Qué le propondrá?

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa recomienda a su hermano Albertano para presentar el nuevo shampoo Placentex Antiesponge. Maria le plancha el uniforme de Elvis y provoca los celos de Doña Lucha, que se lo arruga.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: El Chino necesita visitar el Museo de Antropología e Historia para un trabajo de la escuela. María se ofrece a acompañarlo y compromete a Albertano a ir con ellos. Sin embargo, los jóvenes pasan una romántica tarde hasta que se acuerdan lo prometido.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Renata empieza a trabajar como vendedora de cosméticos porque está harta de que en la casa nadie ayude con la limpieza.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Gaby está triste porque Plutarco encontró trabajo como auxiliar de vuelo y se ausenta. Martina se pone a dieta y Alfonso encuentra una cadenita valiosa que trae problemas.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Un comercial anuncia cómo poder deshacerse de los locutores por medio del dispositivo "ALM". El doctor Frías resolverá las dudas de las personas en el show Medicazos de la vida real.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer analiza las frases que dicen los mexicanos. El cirujano plástico Busto Derrocha. Peliculeando con Bere Nice y Don Oscar Ariel Indio Fernández.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: El Lonje Moco se queda dormido presentando sus historias. Julian Tesquenadie presenta el quemador de discos con patos. La licenciada Pamela Juanjo entrevista a Luis Miguel.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Alz y Heimmer hablan sobre sus amigos del pasado, pero uno de ellos olvida todo. El agente "D Zente" abre un nuevo caso titulado "El asesinato del millonario de la calle Hill".

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer enfurece al ver que uno de los camarógrafos no hace el conteo debido para empezar la grabación. Sammy y Miguel Luis muestran su nueva "Sección Imposible" con el tema del Día de Reyes.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico descubre que no tiene nada de dinero, el banco los va a embargar y Federica habla con ellos y les dice que Ludovico se murió para que cancelen su deuda, pero asistirán al velorio porque es una muerte muy sospechosa.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico no sabe qué regalarle a Federica para su aniversario, se emborracha con Flavio y van a tatuarse los nombres de sus esposas, pero los tatuadores se equivocan y ponen los nombres al revés.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica vende zapatos de piel por catálogo y Ludovico se pone muy celoso porque está ganando mucho dinero y decide competir con ella vendiendo ropa interior para mujer, pero es detenido por vender sin permiso.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica están aprendiendo a usar el chat para conocer gente usando nombres falsos. En el chat, sin darse cuenta. se encuentran entre ellos.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico creen que Ludoviquito tendrá su primera relación sexual. A lo que al final era el cumpleaños de la sobrina de don Camerino.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Reverte miente a Roberta para que no descubra que es su padre. Lola intenta seducir a Diego, pero éste la rechaza. Roberta se entera de que Iñaki ni siquiera tiene primos. Alma y Franco planean vivir con Roberta para que ella acepte a Franco.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma les dice a Roberta y a Mia que van a cenar todos juntos en casa de Franco. Raquel golpea a Sol por coquetear con Teo. Johnny firma con RBD para grabar su primer disco. Sabrina aprovecha la ausencia de Mia y lleva a Miguel a cenar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta se resiste a convivir con Franco y Mia. Santos habla con Lola para advertirle que Diego está enamorado de Roberta. Miguel es seducido por Sabrina y engaña a Mia. Diego le pide a Roberta que retomen su relación.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel se siente terrible por haber dormido con Sabrina, después ella se presenta en la escuela. Llegan a hacer una auditoría a Gandía. Diego presenta a Lola como su novia. Mía le confiesa a Miguel que está lista para su primera vez con él.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta va a casa de Reverte para descubrirlo. Miguel confiesa no haberse cuidado con Sabrina. Eligen a Mía y Roberta como capitanas del equipo de porristas. Mía le pide a Roberta consejos de sexualidad.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta acompaña a Mía al ginecólogo porque necesita orientación sexual para planear su primera vez con Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Raymundo y Viridiana le dicen a Lupita que Lola es adoptada. Franco le confiesa a Mía y Miguel que no sabe cómo hablar de sexo con ellos. Alma y Franco se besan y Reverte se molesta al verlos. Los chicos del otro Insti llegan y empieza la rivalidad.

programme.title: Sortilegio: En peligro
programme.desc: Alex logra comunicarse con su familia y todos se alegran al saber que está vivo, pero Paula sabe que ella y María José están en peligro. María José se niega a ayudar a Bruno en su terrible plan.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Renato le deja en claro a Aimeé que la matará si llega a engañarlo. Clemencia le cuenta a Juan la historia de sus padres. Juan enfrenta a Rodrigo afuera de la iglesia y descubre que es padre de Regina y Aimeé.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje

programme.title: Corazón salvaje

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: This is the new Bugatti Tourbillon, the successor to the Veyron and the Chiron, due to be delivered in 2026. Its looks are very much evolution rather than revolution but unlike its predecessors the Tourbillon doesn't have a turbocharged W16 engine, instead it has a naturally aspirated, 8.3-litre V16 developed with Cosworth. This produces 1000hp on its own but in conjunction with three electric motors the Tourbillon has a combined hybrid system output of 1800hp (1775bhp).As you can hear in this video, it is a pretty incredible sounding engine, revving to 9000rpm. It's a distinctive sound too and for comparison we've included the soundtracks of a couple of its naturally aspirated hypercar rivals - the 6.5-litre V12 from the Aston Martin Valkyrie and the 3.9-litre V12 from the GMA T.50 (both also developed with Cosworth).Bugatti's Director of Design, Frank Heyl, talks Henry Catchpole around all the fascinating exterior details of the 3.8mIllion Euro Tourbillon but we think the interior is perhaps even more spectacular. With clear influence and inspiration taken from mechanical watches the titanium dials are wonders to behold. The steering wheel is pretty crazy too…And talking of watches, the car's name, Tourbillon, means whirlwind in French, but it is a word widely associated with a complicated mechanism found in watches. As Henry explains, with the help of a Ulysse Nardin, it was invented in 1795 to negate the impact of gravity and improve the accuracy of timekeeping in pocket watches.Of course, this being a Bugatti, it is incredibly fast, with a top speed of 276mph (445kph). It is also capable of 0-62mph in 2sec, 0-124mph in under 5sec, 0-186mph in under 10sec and 0-248mph in under 25sec. But in the age of the hyper EV and cars like the the Bugatti's cousin, the Rimac Nevera, pure performance doesn't seem to carry the sway that it once did, so where does that leave the Tourbillon? Catchpole thinks that the answer can be found in the quartz crisis of the 1970s and what followed.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin's appraising three wildly different cars: an Alfa Romeo 1750 Spider Veloce, Gen IV Dodge Viper and a GT2-style build of a Porsche 993 Turbo.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin "The Appraiser" Comer looks over a 1970 Plymouth Superbird that, while not the top spec for the breed, still has plenty to offer any wing car enthusiast. Colin then has the pleasure of looking at a well-known 1956 Chevrolet 210 Del Ray turned SoCal Street Racer/Gasser. Built with only used and refurbished original and NOS GM parts instead of reproduction "blisterpack" ones, this one of the most thoughtfully built period correct 1960s/1970's style Gasser's Colin has ever seen.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: In this episode, Colin Comer appraises a freshly built barn find 1970 Ford F100 pickup truck, an original-owner 1988 Lamborghini LM002 aka the “Rambo Lambo," and a 1971 Ford Bronco that has been used in some interesting off-road situations.

programme.title: 2020 Ford GT, 1976 Pontiac Trans-Am, and an Aston Martin DB4 | The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin tries to put a value on a 2020 Ford GT that has one of the most desirable paint combinations and trim packages you could get in 2020. After that, Colin focuses his attention on a 1967 Pontiac Trans-Am with the "Screamin' Chicken" on the hood, and a 1962 Aston Martin DB4

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: In this episode of "The Appraiser," Colin Comer has the pleasure of appraising Larry Chen's R32 Nissan Skyline GT-R. After that, HOONIGAN's Vin Anatra shows up with his modified 2009 BMW M3.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin Comer takes a look at a modified Jaguar Mark II and determines if the modifications were worth the investment.Next, Colin gives us the inside scoop on a car 2-cylinder Fiat Abart. To finish up this episode, a legendary classic off-roader rolls into the garage: an FJ40 Toyota Land Cruiser

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Chris Jacobs stops by to surprise Colin with his "Daily" 1985 Porsche 911 Targa and throws Colin for a loop.After that, Colin takes a look at a Porsche 930 Turbo tuned to "outrun the cops," and a ZL1 clone Chevrolet Camaro.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin Comer takes a look at a 1993 Ford Mustang SVT Cobra with only 500 miles on it followed by one of the original “Rent-A-Racers”: a 1966 Shelby GT 350 Hertz.To finish things up, Colin brings in a another 1966 Mustang, but this one has over 350,000 miles on the odometer!

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin Comer starts this episode out with an original 1969 double COPO Camaro before moving onto a well-driven and well-loved 1969 Ford Mustang Mach 1.Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Camaro Z/28 that has a 302ci "DZ-code" V8 and a stack of documents to keep someone busy for days. This car has a glowing wrap sheet but it's going to take more than the right specs and shiny paint to hit a six-figure price tag. Will Colin agree with the owner's price?

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin has the pleasure of looking over a rust-free 1966 Dodge Charger from the Arizona desert with all the right factory options.Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Dodge Coronet Super Bee that is an all-original California-built car. Packaged with a 383ci V8 and a factory N96 air grabber hood, Colin thinks this to be an attractive car based on its unique color combo of high-impact F6 metallic green and black interior. But, original cars do come with flaws and Colin found a few in the rear end of the car.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Tag along as Mike figures out why an icy townhouse attic is making snow cones.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Lisa and Simon were preparing to have their first baby and needed to build a nursery and a bathroom. They found a reputable contractor at a home show with impressive credentials and long list of references. A contract was drafted, a substantial down payment was paid, and the 6-week job would be starting almost immediately. Over the next four months, every excuse was given why they could not start the job. With the realization that they may not have a properly functioning full bathroom, and a new born due in three months- Lisa and Simon fired the contractor- and called Mike Holmes. Time is ticking, with a baby on the way, and a bathroom and nursery that will need to be built again. Mike and the team race to beat the Stork!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Navigate a bad bathroom reno that two Mike Holmes junkies thought they'd nailed.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey embarks on a journey through streets that have a 500+-year coffee history of scandal, triumph, and tragedy, from Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque and Topkapi Palace to coffee-infused nargile (hookah) and the trendy Karakoy District. Joey discovers and prepares the ultimate Turkish brew at Cup of Joy in time to catch the 13th-century coffee-inspired Whirling Dervish dancers.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: All roads in the pursuit of excellence lead to Japan. Joey discovers that specialty canned coffee from a vending machine pairs well with street food. Bullet train travel leads to a tea farm trek and tasting, coffee in a rickshaw, and Yemen mocha brewed Arab style. Joey makes coffee history in Kyoto preparing and brewing "Geisha" coffee with an authentic Japanese Geisha.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: In the wake of an expedition along the slopes of active volcanic calderas, Joey heads to Big Island Coffee where coffee, cacao, and papaya abound, sheep maintain the landscaping, and the coffee tastes like pop rocks. A Jurassic-inspired detour leads through Akaka Falls, the green turtle pools, and a vanilla bean farm. A salt-massaged coffee is celebrated with Rusty's Hawaiian Coffee Farms.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. She tastes onion pie, delicious cured pork, and one of the oldest cheeses in the world, kopanisti, still made on the island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, yachting and water sports, just 20 minutes south of the Greek capital, Athens. Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a famous local marble sculptor en route to visit an old friend and great cook, where she learns the secrets of pinched sweet cheese cakes, ancient sesame-honey confections and more. Back in her own kitchen, she creates a luscious Tinos-style artichoke bread pudding and red mullet in caper sauce, both Tinos traditional specialties.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores everything from beguiling mastiha, to the local pasta to unique tomatoes, dangling like giant rubies against the renowned geometric patterns on medieval houses of Pyrgi. The flavors of historic Chios inspire her to cook up a succulent chicken and quince dish and an easy traditional black eyed pea salad with Mastiha vinaigrette.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.sub-title: Naxos: Meat & Potatoes Like You Never Had'em
programme.desc: Naxos is famed for the quality of its meats, its array of cow's milk and sheep-and-goats' milk cheeses and for its potatoes. Diane heads from the shore straight to a remote mountain hideaway with Alexis in tow, where two local cooks await them with a feast of stuffed lamb, potatoes, and a unique skillet pumpkin-onion pie.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Near the historic Bay of Navarino, blanketed by olive, citrus trees and home to historical culinary artifacts unearthed in prehistoric clay tablets at Pylos, Diane cooks with two village ladies, making a local pork and fig dish, and olive-oil fried bread. Inspired by the cornucopia of olive oil, oranges and other local delicacies, she cooks up a Messinian meal.

programme.title: Best Of Week, With Hugh Grant, Marie Kondo, Drew-Gooder Surprise
programme.desc: In a season two pre-party event, Drew's sharing her favorite moments from season one all week long, sharing bonus content and behind-the-scenes commentary on what really went down. Drew kicks things off by revisiting behind-the-scenes secrets Hugh Grant revealed while filming some of his famous movies. Then, Drew's dream came true when declutter queen Marie Kondo stopped by to share some of her favorite organizational tips. Plus, Drew has a very special surprise for Drew-Gooder Alicia White who created a non-profit focused on the revitalization and development of underserved communities.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Best Friends Hour with Cameron Diaz, Battle of the Bites: Cali Tacos, Hometown SpiritIndianapolis
programme.desc: Cameron Diaz is joining Drew for a BFF hour, where the entire studio audience is filled with best friends. Plus, Cameron and Drew partake in an all new Battle of the Bites: Cali Taco edition! Plus, Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Indianapolis.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Nicole Byer, Chef Edy Massih, Drew's News
programme.desc: “Grand Crew” star Nicole Byer stops by to chat. Then, chef and entrepreneur Edy Massih whips up za'atar shakshuka with seared halloumi and cherry tomato on the side. Plus, Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: “Sing 2” actress Reese Witherspoon stops by to chat. Plus, Drew is celebrating nurses all show long in this special nurses' appreciation show, where the entire studio audience is filled with nurses! The fun-filled hour is jam-packed with surprises, incredible nurse Drew-Gooders and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's the colorful hour, all-show long Drew celebrates the bold, bright and beautiful colors all around us. In Drew's News, Drew and Ross Mathews chat with Kitten Kay Sera, who recently married the color pink after dating it for 40 years. Then, in Designed by Drew, Drew surprises a deserving mom of three by transforming her beige bedroom into a space full of color and shares her top tips for those who want to go bold. Plus, beauty expert Mi- Anne Chan shares how to shake up your beauty routine at any age with pops of purple.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: The Estefans, Beauty In A Box: Drugstore Edition, Drew's News with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Gloria Estefan, Lili Estefan and Emily Estefan stop by to chat about their new season of “Red Table Talk: The Estefans.” Then, it's Beauty In A Box: Drugstore Edition, Drew is helping one viewer with her beauty routine by sharing her favorite drug store finds. Plus, “This Is Life with Lisa Ling” host Lisa Ling is joining Drew at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's News with Kyle Mooney, John Early, OnePiece, ThreeLooks
programme.desc: Drew is joined by “Saturday Morning All Star Hits!” star Kyle Mooney at the news desk for an all new Drew's News. Plus, “Search Party” star John Early on the show's final season. Plus, Drew's Crew makeup and style guru Zanna Roberts Rassi is sharing with viewers one piece that you can turn into three different looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.desc: Actor Jeff Goldblum on his Disney+ series “The World According to Jeff Goldblum.” Plus, “Riverdale” actress Madelaine Petsch stops by to chat. Plus, Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Dallas.

programme.title: Heather Hamrick vs. Christopher Jones
programme.desc: Heather and Chris have cheated on each other and it doesn't appear either of them is willing to stop. Heather says she's sick of Chris sleeping all day and playing video games all night. Chris claims Heather keeps taking his cash and pawns his stuff.

programme.title: Davarius Greaves-Brown vs. La'Toya Ward, Part 1
programme.desc: The engagement may be off for this couple. Davarius says LaToya keeps accusing him of cheating, argues with his family and kept her previous kids a secret from him.PART 1

programme.title: Davarius Greaves-Brown vs. La'Toya Ward, Part 2
programme.desc: Davarius and LaToya are engaged and have 3 children together, but Davarius says LaToya didn't reveal to him she had two other kids until after their first child was born. PART 2

programme.title: Aigner Francis vs Dameien Donta Williams
programme.desc: Constant allegations of cheating have caused Aigner and Dameien to separate. Aigner is willing to take a lie detector test to prove she's faithful. But, Dameien says that's not good enough and he wants a DNA test to prove their 9 year old son is his child.

programme.title: Justine Patterson vs. Dontavis Patterson
programme.desc: This couple got married after knowing each other for only 3 weeks. Dontavis wants to start a family right way. Justine worries they're not ready since all they do is argue, plus his ex-girlfriend recently popped up again.

programme.title: Andrea Ketterling vs. Trevor Ketterling
programme.desc: The honeymoon is over for Andrea and Trevor. They've only been married for 9 months but Trevor's struggle with drugs is ripping them apart.

programme.title: Tyron Rivers vs. Tiawanda Foucha
programme.desc: Tiawanda wants to be a rap star, but Tyron says she needs to focus on their relationship and not her career. This couple has been married, divorced and are engaged again, but will they make it back down the aisle?

programme.title: Johnathan Chavez vs. Kelly Condori, Part 1
programme.desc: Jon and Kelly first met in high school and re-connected years later. Their relationship has been rocky from the start with both sides cheating and unable to move past the infidelity.

programme.title: Johnathan Chavez vs. Kelly Condori, Part 2
programme.desc: Constant fighting has driven a wedge between Jon and Kelly. Both have cheated and refuse to forgive each other. Kelly hopes they can make it work and start a family, but Jon isn't so sure.

programme.title: Amanda Thomas vs. James Bright
programme.desc: Amanda says when James gets drunk he cheats and lies. James has had 4 DUI's and totaled 3 of her cars. On top of that, Amanda says a woman sent her a picture of James passed out in the woman's bed. James blames Amanda for his drinking and claims his cheating days are over.

programme.title: Cherree Johnson vs Marshell Meeks
programme.desc: Cherree relocated to be with Marshell and make a new start. After living together for a year and a half, Cherree says Marshell is obsessed with sex and wants it every day. Marshell has admitted to cheating with different women.

programme.title: Alvin Owens vs. Holly Bundley
programme.desc: Alvin and Holly met at a hospital and are engaged, but their relationship is now on life support. Alvin says Holly babies her adult sons. Holly says Alvin's drinking, jealousy and insecurities are pushing her away.

programme.title: Rashonda Brown vs. Jovan Brown
programme.desc: Rashonda and Jovan are desperately trying to save their marriage. Rashonda feels Jovan is pressuring her to be the perfect wife and mother. Jovan says he just wants a little love and appreciation when he's home.

programme.title: Donquea Brown vs. Michael Summers
programme.desc: Quea and Michael can't make it down the aisle because they keep breaking up. Quea says Michael's family doesn't like her. Michael claims Quea drinks too much and her insecurity is driving him away.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Uncommon and hardly known, today the Dugong is the most threatened sea mammal on the planet. The species can only be found in certain parts of the Indian Ocean and in the western regions of the Pacific. Off the coast of Mozambique, in the Bazaruto archipelago, Karen is on a mission to monitor this species and implement policies to bring it back from the brink of extinction.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Meet Lena and Olya Esipovas, a formidable mother-daughter team based in Uzbekistan devoting their lives to saving the saiga – a critically endangered antelope with a distinctive bulbous nose. In 2015 an epidemic tragically wiped out half of the remaining population, killing over 200,000 animals in just a few days, making the work of Lena and Olya and their team of volunteers all the more urgent.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: The Kakapo, or owl parrot, is a large flightless bird found on two New Zealand islands: Codfish Island and Anchor Island. In the 1990s their numbers dropped to as low as 50 birds but this figure is now on the rise. Deidre Vercoe is responsible for running a conservation scheme which monitors each one of the remaining birds to keep them safe and to encourage them to breed.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.sub-title: Anna and the Thresher Sharks (The Philippines)
programme.desc: On the island of Malapascua in the Philippines, Anna Oposa and her team are working with local fisherman to create a nature reserve where thresher sharks can thrive. These sharks are famous for their long tails which they use to whip and stun their prey. Every day, pelagic thresher sharks head to Monad Shoal, a sunken island just off the coast of Malapascua, where other fish “clean” them of their external parasites. This remarkable sight is popular with divers but the numbers of thresher sharks are dwindling and Anna is spearheading the campaign to protect this incredible species in the Philippines.

programme.title: Saving Paradise
programme.sub-title: The Wild Archipelago Of The Bissagos Islands
programme.desc: A natural paradise located off the coast of Guinea Bissau, the Bissagos archipelago is a strategic place for the conservation of the planet's biodiversity.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror
programme.desc: Having witnessed the ravages of a deadly tornado just a few days earlier, on the last day of their chase the storm hunters are again shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury
programme.desc: On only her second trip storm chasing, meteorologist Jaclyn Whittal joins Mark Robinson in a shocking and gut-wrenching ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific and dangerous tornado season on record.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fire and Water
programme.desc: With summer wildfires overpowering the Yukon forests, host/adventurer George Kourounis follows the fabled route of the Klondike Gold Rush sourdoughs through the bawdy town of Skagway, Alaska, paddling the white water rivers and the White Horse Rapids into the Yukon. He travels on mountain bike, steam train and Cessna to experience the huge fires and meet the northern fire crews battling the blazes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Weather of 2005
programme.desc: 2005 saw some of the wildest weather in the history of the planet. Host/adventurer George Kourounis tracks twisters through the Tornado Alley of Oklahoma and Texas, descends into the Erte Ale Volcano in the Danakil Depression of Ethiopia (the worlds hottest place), and then witnesses Hurricane Katrina destroying the town of Gulfport, Mississippi, from a steel-reinforced bunker facing the debris-strewn beachfront.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Avalanche
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Blizzard
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fin del Mundo
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile the area the South Americans call the Fin del Mundo the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat Northanger to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror
programme.desc: Having witnessed the ravages of a deadly tornado just a few days earlier, on the last day of their chase the storm hunters are again shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury
programme.desc: On only her second trip storm chasing, meteorologist Jaclyn Whittal joins Mark Robinson in a shocking and gut-wrenching ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific and dangerous tornado season on record.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Shear Strength
programme.desc: On his home turf in Canada, Mark and his team chase one of nature's deadliest forces, coming face to face with tornadoes' shear strength.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Traverse The Dam, Bee Headed, Water Coffin
programme.desc: Are you worth a Dam? Suspended high over a dam is a 350-foot long tightrope with flags attached. Contestants would have to cross the tightrope and collect flags while holding on to a higher tightrope for support. The two men and the two women to collect the most flags in 5 minutes would advance to the next round. Stunt 2 is a real Bee. The ones left are covered with over 200,000 honeybees. Once covered, they would have stand for 2 minutes covered in bees. All contestants who completed this stunt would advance to the finals. For the finale, contestants are locked inside a Plexiglas box full of holes and submerged underwater. Once a red light came on, they would have to figure out which of 2 keys unlocked the coffin and swim to the surface. The contestant to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion.
